description: Create a new custom Slash Command in Rocket.Chat using the admin credentials (Username: `admin`, Password: `Admin1234!`). Configure the command with the trigger `deploy-status`, request URL `http://internal-tools.local/api/deploy/status`, request method `GET`, and description `Check the status of the current deployment`. Ensure the command is enabled.

metadata.expected_description: Check the status of the current deployment
